name: Ninja Midori
short_description: Ninja Midori is 2d sidescroller. Inspired by retro old school platformers with 8 bit graphics, run jump and collect shurikens as you make your way to save the princess.
detailed_description:
Fight your way through this retro 8 bit platformer as you make your way to save the princess from your evil nemesis the devil

Features :

  • Jump your way through 15 levels
  • Take down 3 Big Bosses
  • Enjoy Retro 8 Bit Graphics
  • Steam Achivements
  • Grab a buddy and play Ninja Midori together in Co-op moded
  • Blitz through the game and see how fast you can beat it in Speed Run Mode
  • Full controller support
